name: {NICKNAME}
desc: A {F#girl}{M#boy} who boarded the Astral Express.\n{F#She}{M#He} chose to travel with the Astral Express to eliminate the dangers posed by the Stellaron.

1.name: A Falling Star
1.desc: When enemies are defeated due to the Trailblazer's Ultimate, the Trailblazer regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> extra Energy. This effect can only be triggered once per attack.

2.name: An Unwilling Host
2.desc: Attacking enemies with Physical Weakness restores the Trailblazer's HP equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of the Trailblazer's ATK.

3.name: A Leading Whisper
3.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

4.name: A Destructing Glance
4.desc: When attacking an enemy that is <u>Weakness Broken</u>, increases CRIT Rate by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

10000006.name: Weakness Break State
10000006.desc: When enemy targets' Toughness is reduced to 0, they will enter the Weakness Break State, which delays their actions.

5.name: A Surviving Hope
5.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

6.name: A Trailblazing Will
6.desc: The Trailblazer's Talent is also triggered when they defeat an enemy.

800201.name: Farewell Hit
800201.desc: Deals Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of the Trailblazer's ATK to one designated enemy.
800201.simple_desc: Deals minor Physical DMG to one enemy.

800202.name: RIP Home Run
800202.desc: Deals Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of the Trailblazer's ATK to one designated enemy and enemies adjacent to it.
800202.simple_desc: Deals Physical DMG to one enemy and enemies adjacent to it.

800203.name: Stardust Ace
800203.desc: Choose between two attack modes to deliver a full strike.\n"Blowout: Farewell Hit" deals Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of the Trailblazer's ATK to one designated enemy.\n"Blowout: RIP Home Run" deals Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of the Trailblazer's ATK to one designated enemy, and Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of the Trailblazer's ATK to enemies adjacent to it.
800203.simple_desc: Uses Single Target ATK or Blast to strike with full force.

800204.name: Perfect Pickoff
800204.desc: Each time after this character inflicts Weakness Break on an enemy, ATK increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>. This effect stacks up to <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> time(s).
800204.simple_desc: Every time this unit breaks an enemy target's Weakness, ATK increases.

800206.name: Attack
800206.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

800207.name: Immortal Third Strike
800207.desc: Immediately heals all allies for <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of their respective Max HP after using this Technique.
800207.simple_desc: After using Technique, immediately <color=#f29e38ff>restores HP</color> for team.

800208.name: Blowout: Farewell Hit
800208.desc: Deals Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of the Trailblazer's ATK to one designated enemy.
800208.simple_desc: Deals massive Physical DMG to one enemy.

800209.name: Blowout: RIP Home Run
800209.desc: Deals Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Trailblazer's ATK to one designated enemy and Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Trailblazer's ATK to enemies adjacent to it.
800209.simple_desc: Deals Physical DMG to one enemy and enemies adjacent to it.

1.point_desc: At the start of the battle, immediately regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy.
Each Talent stack increases the Trailblazer's DEF by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.
When using Skill or Ultimate "Blowout: RIP Home Run," DMG dealt to the target enemy is increased by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.
